page_content:
HLSA798 HLSA Journal Club (1 Credit)

The course will highlight current topics in health services research. Outside speakers will present their research in a few of the classes.

For the other classes, graduate students in the HLSA programs will select important and timely articles that they will present to the class for discussion in an informal setting.

Restriction: Must be HLSA graduate student.

Repeatable to: 8 credits if content differs.

HLSA799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) HLSA898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) HLSA899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)
